MASTER CALENDAR JURY ASBESTOS
Off Calendar Sep-08-2022 Vacated

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT & Notice Of Motion For Summary Judgment
Off Calendar Oct-13-2022 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
Not contested and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant Keenan Properties, Inc.'s Motion for Summary Judgment is DENIED. Plaintiff filed an objection based on timeliness. Defendant failed to comply with the 75-day notice requirement under Code of Civil Procedure section 437c(a)(2). (see also Code Civ. Proc. sections 12, 12a, and 12c(a) and 1010.6(a)(4)(B).) Order signed in open court. Judge: Cynthia Ming-mei Lee, Clerk: A. Mok. Not reported. (503/CML)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Maintaining The Current Trial Date With Preference
Off Calendar Sep-08-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES Via CourtCall:
Katelyn Benbowski of WILSON ELSER MOSKOWITZ EDELMAN & DICKER LLP (415-433-0990), appearing for defendant Anderson Rowe & Buckely Inc.
Gabriel A. Jackson of Goldberg Segalla LLP (415-632-8245) appearing for defendant Boss Manufacturing
Randall K. Bernard of HAWKINS PARNELL & YOUNG (415-766-3200) appearing for defendant Harley-Davidson, Inc.
Thomas A. Steig of PRINDLE, GOETZ, BARNES & REINHOLTZ, LLP (415-788-8354), appearing for defendant Consolidated Insulation, Inc.
Jon C. James of HUGO & PARKER (415-808-0300), appearing for defendant Trane U.S., Inc. and Foster Wheeler LLC.
Suzanne E. Rischman of SELMAN BREITMAN LLP (415-979-0400), appearing for defendant Scott Co. of California and The Olympic Glove and Safety Co.

RULING:
Not contested and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiff's Motion for Order Maintaining the Current Trial Date with Preference is GRANTED under Code of Civil Procedure section 36(a). Defendant Boss Manufacturing Company filed a conditional non-opposition.

The trial date of November 14, 2022 is vacated. The new trial date is December 27, 2022 at 11:15 a.m. in Department 503. Last day pursuant to C.C.P. section 36(f) is January 6, 2023. Local Rule 20 shall be followed by the parties as well as all San Francisco Local Rules and California Rules of Court.

All pre-trial dates and deadlines remain dictated by the November 14, 2022 trial date.

Plaintiff to make a settlement demand on defendants no later than November 11, 2022. Responses to the demand are due no later than November 25, 2022. The parties are ordered to provide confidential settlement demands/offers stating their best and final settlement effort. This confidential value must be separately submitted to Commissioner Pang Ly via electronic mail by December 16, 2022 at 12:00 p.m. Mandatory settlement conference is set for Thursday, December 22, 2022 at 9 a.m. in 603. Personal appearance is required by all unless a party is granted excuse based on good cause. Order signed in open court. Judge: Cynthia Ming-mei Lee, Clerk: A. Mok. Not reported. (503/CML)

ASBESTOS CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-17-2022 Set For Trial On Nov-14-22 At 11:15 A.M. In Dept 503
